description: A farmer needs to move a large combine harvester between two farms and must check the route for any restrictions.

nodes.task_description: Get the dimensions (height, width, weight) of the combine harvester.
Plan a route between the two farm locations.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates the shortest driving route.

nodes.task_description: Check the planned route for any low bridges, weight-restricted roads, or other transport hazards.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent identifies a low bridge on the planned route and suggests an alternative.
